name: Lucy 10x16 Shed Plan - A Barn-Style Storage Shed with Classic Charm & Efficient Function
open_features: A traditional barn-style roof dramatically increases overhead clearance - perfect for loft storage, tall shelving, or large equipment.
Designed with straightforward framing, intuitive assembly steps, and clean structural lines that make the build manageable for beginners and satisfying for experienced builders.
Rustic barn-style double doors allow smooth movement of mowers, gardening tools, workshop materials, bikes, and seasonal storage items.
Vertical wood siding, white trim accents, and dark farmhouse lighting create a timeless country look with durable, modern performance.
description_summary: Kickstart your next backyard upgrade with the Lucy Barn Shed Plan - a 10x16 premium storage and workspace solution designed for timeless beauty, reliable construction, and everyday utility. Featuring a charming gambrel barn roof, natural wood vertical siding, crisp white trim, and rustic barn-style double doors, Lucy delivers classic countryside appeal while providing exceptional interior storage capacity.
